title: Count Number of Nice Subarrays
hints: Transform the problem by replacing even numbers with 0 and odd numbers with 1. Now you need subarrays with a sum of exactly k.
Use a prefix sum array to track the cumulative count of odd numbers encountered so far.
A subarray ending at index i is nice if a previous prefix sum equals current_sum minus k. Count how many times each prefix sum value has appeared.
